actionLibraryList.title: Mat Lying Toe Taps
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with arms by your sides. Bend the hips and knees to tabletop position (90°), keeping a neutral spine and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the abdominals, maintain pelvic stability, and lower one leg in a controlled manner, lightly tapping the toes on the floor without moving the torso.
3.Inhale, return the leg to tabletop position.
4.Exhale, switch to the other leg and repeat the toe tap, alternating sides. Maintain core stability and controlled rhythm throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688634189.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck, allowing them to sink downward."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and lower the leg.
Inhale to return with control.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching or sagging the lower back.
2.Do not lower the legs too quickly or use momentum to tap the toes.
3.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Shoulder Bridg
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with a neutral spine and pelvis, feet hip-width apart on the mat. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, posteriorly tilt the pelvis and articulate the spine sequentially from the tailbone upward, engaging the glutes to lift the hips until full hip extension is achieved.
3.Inhale, maintain the top position, extending through the spine.
4.Exhale, control the descent, articulating the spine sequentially from the thoracic vertebrae down to the sacrum, returning to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688712470.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck, keeping the shoulder blades stable and pressed downward.\n2.Keep the lower limbs firmly planted and still."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and articulate the spine.
Inhale to hold and stabilize the top position.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid rib flaring or pelvic rotation.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side-Lying Clam
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side in a neutral spine position. Relax the chest, align the head, torso, and legs in a straight line, with heels together. Engage the core. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, lift the top leg, engaging the glutes to abduct while keeping the pelvis vertical and stable.
3.Inhale, control the return as the leg lowers back to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689370239.jpg","context":"1.Allow the shoulders to relax and sink naturally.\n2.Keep the pelvis vertical to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and engage.
Inhale to lower and return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid tilting or rocking forward/backward.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.
3.Maintain control throughout; avoid losing tension during lowering.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Coordination
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling quadruped position with hands under shoulders and knees under hips. Keep the spine neutral, pelvis stable, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, keeping the torso still, extend one arm forward while simultaneously extending the opposite leg backward, reaching both to form a straight line with the body.
3.Inhale, maintain the extension and stability, keeping the spine and pelvis neutral.
4.Exhale, control the return to the starting position, then repeat on the opposite side.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688768674.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine and pelvis stable; avoid sagging the lower back.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to extend and return the arm and leg.
Inhale to hold and stabilize the position.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Keep the spine and pelvis stable; avoid rotation.
3.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: The Hundred Prep
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale and curl the upper body up until the lower tips of the shoulder blades lift off the mat, reaching the arms straight down.
2.Hold the curl height with the core continuously engaged; keep the pelvis stable and the legs in a steady tabletop position.
3.Perform small, rhythmic arm pumps driven from the shoulders.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626760747.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat to avoid arching through the lumbar spine.\n2.Bend the knees and place the feet flat on the mat.\n3.Draw the shoulders down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe steadily throughout.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the torso stable and the lower back in contact with the mat.
2.Relax the neck and avoid shrugging the shoulders.
3.Keep both feet grounded on the floor.

actionLibraryList.title: The Hundred (Tabletop Legs)
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, curling the head, neck, and shoulder blades off the mat in sequence until the lower edge of the shoulder blades remain on the mat.
2.Hold the curl, keeping the core engaged, pelvis stable, and legs in tabletop without movement.
3.Perform small, controlled taps with the arms led by the shoulders.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1771058609378.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat to prevent arching.\n2.Bend the hips and knees, lifting the legs so the shins are roughly parallel to the floor.\n3.Relax the shoulders, letting them drop away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Maintain a steady, even breath.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your lower back and spine in contact with the mat, and keep the legs still.
2.Relax the neck and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

actionLibraryList.title: Thigh Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale. Engage the core to maintain stability and, using the knees as the pivot, slowly lean the body backward with control.
2.Inhale. Keep the core engaged and, following the arms pulling the rope, slowly return the body to a neutral position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770631838108.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lean back.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Perform the movement with control; avoid quickly releasing the rope.

actionLibraryList.title: Thigh Stretch with Extension
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Engage the core and, using the knees as a pivot, slowly lean the body backward to the lowest point with control.
2.Exhale. Sequentially extend the spine backward, turning the gaze slightly to the rear; inhale at the bottom.
3.Exhale. Sequentially return the spine, maintaining core engagement, and follow the arms pulling the rope to slowly return the body to a neutral position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770631863917.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a stable kneeling position."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to lean back, preparing and stabilizing at the bottom.
Exhale to extend the spine and powerfully return to neutral.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Maintain a stable kneeling position.
2.Perform the movement with control; avoid quickly releasing the rope.

actionLibraryList.title: Thigh Stretch with Arm Pull
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Engage the core and, using the knees as a pivot, slowly lean the body backward to the lowest point and hold, preparing for the movement.
2.Exhale. Engage the back and pull both arms backward, slightly past the sides of the body.
3.Inhale. Extend the arms and bring them forward along the sides to the starting position.
4.Exhale. Maintain core engagement and, following the arms pulling the rope, slowly return the body to a neutral position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770632028025.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a stable kneeling position."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to lean back and extend the arms forward, preparing and returning to start.
Exhale to pull the arms back with force, controlling the torso to return to neutral.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Perform the movement with control; avoid quickly releasing the rope.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Leg Sweep
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale and kick the top leg straight forward, gradually increasing the range until it approaches 90 degrees.
2.Exhale and extend the straight leg back, slightly past the body’s midline, focusing on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—only the working leg should move. Avoid any forward/backward or up/down sway caused by the resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628327509.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders.\n2.Keep the pelvis upright."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable, no rocking or tilting.
2.Shoulders down, relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Hip Adduction
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, engage the core, and lift the top leg using the outer glutes; raise only as high as the pelvis remains level.
2.Inhale, resist the band’s tension, and slowly lower the leg back to parallel with the body, maintaining consistent tension.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—avoid rocking or moving due to band resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628348949.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders.\n2.Keep the top leg straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift.
Inhale to lower.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the inner thighs and hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your pelvis stable—don’t let it tilt or rotate.
2.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.
3.Maintain control during the eccentric phase.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Leg Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Keep the top leg straight and kick it forward, then circle it outward as it approaches a 90° angle.
2.Exhale. Extend the straight leg backward, slightly past the midline, and draw a circle back to the center with legs together. Focus on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable; only the working leg moves.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628483844.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep your pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Stabilize the pelvis; no shifting or tilting.
2.Shoulders down and relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Leg Sweep
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale and kick the top leg straight forward, gradually increasing the range until it approaches 90 degrees.
2.Exhale and extend the straight leg back, slightly past the body’s midline, focusing on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—only the working leg should move. Avoid any forward/backward or up/down sway caused by the resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628327509.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders.\n2.Keep the pelvis upright."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable, no rocking or tilting.
2.Shoulders down, relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Hip Adduction
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, engage the core, and lift the top leg using the outer glutes; raise only as high as the pelvis remains level.
2.Inhale, resist the band’s tension, and slowly lower the leg back to parallel with the body, maintaining consistent tension.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—avoid rocking or moving due to band resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628348949.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders.\n2.Keep the top leg straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift.
Inhale to lower.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the inner thighs and hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your pelvis stable—don’t let it tilt or rotate.
2.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.
3.Maintain control during the eccentric phase.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Leg Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Keep the top leg straight and kick it forward, then circle it outward as it approaches a 90° angle.
2.Exhale. Extend the straight leg backward, slightly past the midline, and draw a circle back to the center with legs together. Focus on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable; only the working leg moves.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628483844.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep your pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Stabilize the pelvis; no shifting or tilting.
2.Shoulders down and relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Hug Tree
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Raise the arms out to the sides at shoulder height. Exhale, pushing both hands forward to chest level with palms facing each other.
2.Inhale. Slowly return the hands outward against the resistance of the band, controlling the movement back to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628799619.jpg","context":"1.Maintain a neutral spine and engage the core.\n2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Maintain a neutral spine; avoid sagging or compensating with the lower back.
2.Keep the shoulders down and relaxed.
3.Return slowly; avoid releasing too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Arm Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with the arms at your sides. Exhale, lifting the arms up. As they approach eye level, internally rotate the arms and continue to circle them upward and outward.
2.When the arms reach shoulder height, inhale and slowly circle the arms downward and inward, returning them to the starting position at your sides.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628834011.jpg","context":"1.Maintain a neutral spine and engage the core.\n2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Maintain steady breathing.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Maintain a neutral spine; avoid sagging or compensating with the lower back.
2.Keep the shoulders down and relaxed.
3.Return slowly; avoid releasing too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Squat with Biceps Curl
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, hinge at the hips as if sitting back into an invisible chair, while pulling the band toward your chest.
2.Inhale, keep the core engaged, slowly straighten the legs to stand, and controlledly extend the arms forward against the band’s resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628633945.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine neutral.\n2.Align knees with toes.\n3.Relax the shoulders, letting them drop naturally."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to pull.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the arms, glutes, and legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the knees from going too far past the toes.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed—no shrugging.
3.Avoid arching the lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Hamstring Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit tall on the mat with legs extended together or hip-width apart. Flex the feet, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lengthen the spine, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare, reaching forward to hold the ankles. Exhale as you hinge from the hips into a forward fold, feeling a gentle stretch along the hamstrings. Maintain steady breathing while in the stretch.
3.Exhale with control to return to an upright seated position, keeping the feet flexed and the pelvis stable.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691228783.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Lengthen the spine as much as possible, avoiding a collapsed lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Butterfly Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit with the knees bent and the soles of the feet together, drawing them in toward the body. Hold the feet or ankles, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare. Exhale as you hinge slightly forward from the hips, maintaining a long spine. At the stretch position, perform small, controlled pulses with an even rhythm. Allow the knees to drop naturally to the sides without forcing, feeling a gentle stretch through the inner thighs and hips while breathing smoothly.
3.Exhale to reduce the range and pause. Inhale with control to return to upright, then repeat.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691248774.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe steadily.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch through the hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Lengthen the spine as much as possible and avoid collapsing the lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Child Pose
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with the knees hip-width apart. Press the tops of the feet into the mat, sit the hips back toward the heels, and keep the pelvis stable.
2.Lengthen the spine, then hinge forward from the hips. Gently rest the forehead on the mat, extending the arms forward or placing them alongside the body to allow a gentle stretch through the lats and lower back. Keep the hips as close to the heels as possible and breathe evenly throughout the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690951913.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine with a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the spine.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Avoid arching the lower back.
